name: get_home_heating_running_times
description: Retrieve historical heating system running times and activity for a home. Returns timeline of when the heating was active, duration, and related metrics useful for analyzing heating performance and energy consumption patterns. Supports filtering by date range and aggregation by time period (day, month).

aggregate.description: Time period aggregation level (optional, default none)

from.description: Start date for the running times data in YYYY-MM-DD format (required)

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home

summary_only.description: Return only summary statistics without detailed records (optional, default false)

to.description: End date for the running times data in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional)
